targets.notes: Amazon has committed to achieve net-zero carbon across its business by 2040 as part of The Climate Pledge; the target is not validated by SBTi.
targets.title: Net-zero carbon across Amazons business by 2040 (The Climate Pledge)

targets.boundary: electricity use across Amazons operations globally
targets.notes: Target to source 100% of electricity for Amazons operations from renewable energy by 2025, primarily affecting market-based Scope 2 emissions.
targets.title: 100% renewable energy for Amazon operations by 2025
